composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief:
NO ACTION. Signal state is BEAR with no drawdown extreme. Bitcoin sits 48.4% below its 1yr high and 30-day realised volatility is 34%, both triggering structural risk filters. The system blocks entry in this regime: backtests show BEAR phase without crisis z-score (below -3.0) delivers -6.2% median at 120 days. Current z-score of +0.57 is neutral. Buying is not indicated.

Two structural headwinds explain the block. First, BTC remains deeply underwater relative to its 1yr peak, well past the -35% threshold that signals a break in regime rather than a recoverable dip. Second, realised volatility at 34% sits below the 40% floor needed to confirm a capitulation environment. Without both crisis z-score and structural validation, holding cash or existing positions is the appropriate stance.
